sglang.title: fix: continue to use flashinfer 0.1.6 temporarily
sglang.author: zhyncs
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
If using the latest 0.2.0, CI cannot pass. Temporarily fix it to 0.1.6 and wait for FlashInfer to release 0.2.0.post1 or 0.2.1 before lifting the restriction again.
ref https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/actions/runs/12407074179
cc @yzh119 @merrymercy

Modifications

Checklist

 Format

vllm.title: [Kernel]: Cutlass 2:4 Sparsity + FP8/Int8 Quant Support
vllm.author: dsikka
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Add sparse quantized and unquantized kernels for CUTLASS 3.x.
Add compressed tensors support for 2of4 Sparse Only, 2of4 Sparse + INT8/FP8 Quantized Models

From Neural Magic

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix broken phi3-v mm_processor_kwargs tests
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix broken mm_processor_kwargs tests for phi3-v, because num_crops is not exposed in get_max_phi3v_image_tokens.
The mm_processor_kwargs tests were not triggered in #11199 CI and before, because the test-pipeline hadn't updated at that time.

vllm.title: [FIX] update openai version
vllm.author: jikunshang
vllm.bodyExcerpt: PR #11027 import  ChatCompletionContentPartInputAudioParam. this is introduced in openai 1.52.0  PR 1796

vllm.title: [Bugfix] fix minicpmv test
vllm.author: joerunde
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Context: https://vllm-dev.slack.com/archives/C07QT0LUF4K/p1734490695369139
This test now reserves too much memory after the profiling changes

vllm.title: [V1] VLM - enable processor cache by default
vllm.author: alexm-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt: We have found that V1 VLM prefix caching performs best when it is combined with VLM processor cache. This PR enables VLM processor cache by default, so we get best performance in all cases.

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Build/CI] Fix sparse CUTLASS compilation on CUDA [12.0, 12.2)
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
We were checking against CUDA 12.0 when we should have been checking for 12.2
https://github.com/NVIDIA/cutlass/blob/e1cd8c7866dd6de02b66a89879795e7d7301aacc/examples/62_hopper_sparse_gemm/62_hopper_sparse_gemm.cu#L553-L559
I also plumbed up a cutlass_sparse_scaled_mm_supported function so we can fa

vllm.title: [Model] IBM Granite 3.1
vllm.author: tjohnson31415
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
IBM just released new Granite 3.1 models (Press Release; HF Hub).
Tool calling with the new version is different becuase it uses a <tool_call> html-style string to mark the start of a tool call response instead of the <|tool_call|> token. The default chat template from HF Hub passes the unit tests,

vllm.title: [CI] Expand test_guided_generate to test all backends
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Previously we were only testing the default structured output backend, so we should expand to explicitly call all backends. This revealed some lack of support in outlines for json_object and lm-format-enforcer for regex patterns in json schemas.
I also found some of the tests are flaky for some back

vllm.title: [V1] Simplify prefix caching logic by removing `num_evictable_computed_blocks`
vllm.author: heheda12345
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The evictable_computed_blocks are removed from self.free_block_queue during self._touch(computed_blocks), so we do not need to treat them specially in allocate_slots.
The num_evictable_computed_blocks is always zero (I've checked here 667af1b) because self._touch also increases the reference count b

vllm.title: [VLM] Merged multimodal processor for Qwen2-Audio
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Implement #10114 for Qwen2-Audio; also consolidate common code between Ultravox and Qwen2-Audio processing.
I can successfully run the example script with identical results as the previous version of the model.

vllm.title: [Kernel] Refactor Cutlass c3x
vllm.author: varun-sundar-rabindranath
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Refactor Cutlass c3x kernels for better maintainability and easier experimentation.

Break scaled_mm_c3x.cu into,

scaled_mm_c3x.cuh : All the base cutlass c3x code (cutlass_3x_gemm and cutlass_gemm_caller).
scaled_mm_c3x_sm90_fp8_dispatch.cuh : All fp8 kernels along with the gemm shape based dispat

vllm.title: [Misc] Optimize ray worker initialization time
vllm.author: ruisearch42
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR optimizes ray worker initialization time.
In the current code base, ray.get(worker.get_node_ip.remote()) is called for each worker right after we get its handle, and it takes ~3s. This call is expensive because when RayWorkerWrapper.remote() just returns, we get an actor handle, but the acto

vllm.title: [misc] benchmark_throughput : Add LoRA
vllm.author: varun-sundar-rabindranath
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Update benchmark_throughput.py to support LoRA benchmarking.
Examples:
Machine : 1xA100
python3 benchmarks/benchmark_throughput.py --model  meta-llama/Llama-2-7b-hf --backend vllm   --dataset ./ShareGPT_V3_unfiltered_cleaned_split.json --num-prompts 1000
Throughput: 11.45 requests/s, 5509.93 total t
